title: German Chicken Schnitzel
description: A classic German dish, breaded and fried chicken cutlets, served with a side of tangy lemon wedges.
instructions: 1. Pound the chicken breasts to an even thickness.
2. In a shallow dish, mix together the flour, egg, and a pinch of salt.
3. Dip each chicken breast in the flour mixture, coating both sides evenly.
4. Dip the flour-coated chicken in the beaten eggs, making sure to coat completely.
5. Roll the egg-coated chicken in the skewers, pressing gently to adhere.
6. Place the breaded chicken on a plate or tray.
7. Heat about 1/2-inch of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
8. When the oil is hot, add 2-3 breaded chicken cutlets to the skillet.
9. Cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and cooked through.
10. Serve hot with lemon wedges on the side.
